ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the project */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated hours required to complete the project */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours spent on the project */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the project (e.g., developer, manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., developer, manager) */,
  "hours_allocated" INTEGER /* Hours allocated to the user for the project */,
  "hours_spent" INTEGER /* Hours spent by the user on the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Released, Pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the status (e.g., green, red) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated hours required to complete the task */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours spent on the task */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the user is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the task (e.g., developer, manager) */,
  "hours_allocated" INTEGER /* Hours allocated to the user for the task */,
  "hours_spent" INTEGER /* Hours spent by the user on the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the log belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the log belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., velocity, burn rate) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
